The illusory Apple global supply chain OEM template in the original data has been completely formatted. This enterprise, named 'Weishun Electromechanical Technology,' was mechanically labeled as a 'Small Enterprise' and 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' by the official system. The opening statement of its business license is very hardcore: 'production and processing of mechanical equipment and electronic equipment.' However, this is yet another epic crossover rhapsody, immediately followed by 'sales of agricultural products and food,' and finally even features 'earthwork engineering, providing construction labor services, planting seedlings and flowers.' The forensic logic engine directly penetrated this extremely absurd disguise, grasping its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is an absolute 0! Even more devastating are its spatial coordinates: 'Room 507, Building 3, Wanda Plaza (West Zone)... Dongshan Subdistrict, Jiangning District.' The logical deduction instantly turned into an extremely absurd stand-up comedy: in a commercial-residential apartment on the 5th floor of Wanda Plaza, the boss hasn't hired a single employee, bringing 1 million in capital, claiming to have built an electronic mechanical manufacturing assembly line, while simultaneously digging earthwork, planting flowers, and even reselling agricultural products and dispatching construction workers inside the apartment? The probe mercilessly deleted all 'production, processing' delusions from the license, extracting its only logically coherent essential business: 'electromechanical installation engineering construction; providing construction labor services; handling and loading/unloading services.' The truth is starkly naked and strongly features characteristics of the Chinese construction circle: this is a 100% pure '0-Employee Commercial Office Contractor Shell & Labor Broker.' The boss paid in 1 million, and the sole purpose is to take this license to various construction sites to solicit work: from large-scale electromechanical installations and earthwork digging to small-scale provision of porters and planting landscaping seedlings. It produces absolutely no electronic devices; the official 'Manufacturing' tag is the most severe misjudgment of its 'construction labor subcontracting' attribute.
